ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fault_codes" (
  "fault_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fault code */,
  "code" TEXT /* Fault code as used in the system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fault code */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the fault code (e.g., Critical, Warning, Info) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the fault code (e.g., Electrical, Mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fault_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "possible_causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "fault_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated fault code */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Description of the possible cause */,
  "probability" TEXT /* Probability of the cause (value between 0 and 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_possible_causes_fault_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("fault_code_id") REFERENCES fault_codes ("fault_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_clear_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "fault_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated fault code */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to set or clear the fault */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "threshold_value" TEXT /* Threshold value for setting or clearing the fault */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_clear_conditions_fault_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("fault_code_id") REFERENCES fault_codes ("fault_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motor_states" (
  "motor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the motor (e.g., Running, Stopped, Faulty) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time when the motor was last checked */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the motor */,
  "motor_type" TEXT /* Type of motor (e.g., induction, synchronous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "motor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motor the maintenance is related to */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken during maintenance */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance action was performed */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintainer who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_motor_id FOREIGN KEY ("motor_id") REFERENCES motor_states ("motor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "motor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motor being diagnosed */,
  "fault_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fault code identified during the diagnosis */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the diagnostic check */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to resolve the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_reports_fault_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("fault_code_id") REFERENCES fault_codes ("fault_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_reports_motor_id FOREIGN KEY ("motor_id") REFERENCES motor_states ("motor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Maintenance, Engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motor_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "motor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motor the metric is related to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the motor (in RPM) */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature of the motor (in Celsius) */,
  "vibration_level" TEXT /* Vibration level of the motor (in mm/s) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motor_performance_metrics_motor_id FOREIGN KEY ("motor_id") REFERENCES motor_states ("motor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_maintenance_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "motor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motor the model is related to */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the model (value between 0 and 1) */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_maintenance_models_motor_id FOREIGN KEY ("motor_id") REFERENCES motor_states ("motor_id")
)
